title: [Bug]: HumanDuration STATUS of running container ("Up") should not contain "ago"
body:
### Issue Description

In the following output from `podman ps`, the word "ago" should not be used when stating that the container is Up and running. It currently up and running, and has been up "1 second", **not** "1 second ago".

```
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND     CREATED        STATUS                    PORTS       NAMES
fb20c6845f3b  docker.io/library/alpine:latest  /bin/sh     1 second ago   Up 1 second ago                       adoring_mestorf
```
